results.title: Blackgum Harvestime Sewing Sisters to present the 17th annual quilt show
results.description: VIAN – The Blackgum Harvestime Sewing Sisters invite quilt enthusiasts, families, and the community to attend the 17th annual Quilts of Past & Present Quilt Show, celebrating America’s 250th birthday with a display of handcrafted quilts and patriotic spirit.

results.title: Norfolk cheese may soon hit supermarket shelves after it was crowned best in Britain
results.description: A Norfolk cheese has been named the best in Britain and may soon be stocked by a major UK supermarket chain.

results.title: Ammonia leak near school in Thailand's Suphan Buri prompts evacuation alert
results.description: BANGKOK: Residents in Suphan Buri have been urged to avoid an area near an ice factory after an ammonia leak was reported close to a school and a residential community in Doem Bang Nang Buat district.

results.title: EU steps up efforts to cut EES airport delays and border queues
results.description: The European Commission says it will step up efforts to reduce airport delays and long border queues caused by the EU Entry/Exit System (EES) during peak summer travel.

results.title: Motorcyclist leads troopers on high-speed Lehigh Acres chase, ditches bike before arrest, FHP says
results.description: Florida Highway Patrol troopers arrested a man they say led them on a 95 mph chase on a motorcycle before ditching the bike and running away.

results.title: Trump: U.S. may grant Ukraine license to manufacture Patriot missiles
results.description: The U.S. administration is preparing to transfer licensing rights for the production of Patriot interceptor missiles to Ukraine.

results.title: The tenuous state of a US-Iran ceasefire renews anxiety over high fuel prices
results.description: Oil prices rose to their highest point in weeks after Trump declared the ceasefire over.

results.title: Ayodhya donation scandal recalls 1983 Kashi Vishwanath theft that reshaped temple governance
results.description: The theft of Shivling ornaments triggered the Shri Kashi Vishwanath Temple Act, 1983 -- a law that shifted the temple's management from mahants to a government-backed trust.

results.description: Lionel Messi scored another goal — his eighth of the tournament — to help his team to one of the great World Cup comebacks, a 3-2 win over Egypt despite trailing by two with only 11 minutes of regulation time to play.

results.title: City's tax sale brought mixed results
results.description: The City of Thunder Bay had 10 properties on the auction block and received no bids on two, but will gain revenue five times the accrued taxes at eight other locations.

results.title: Passenger rescued from sunken B.C. fishing charter has died in hospital
results.description: One of the passengers who was rescued after a chartered fishing vessel sank near Richmond, B.C., last week later died in hospital, according to authorities.

results.title: NEPRA raises electricity tariff by 34 paisa per unit under May fuel cost adjustment
results.description: The National Electric Power Regulatory Authority (NEPRA) has increased electricity tariffs by 34 paisa per unit for consumers across Pakistan, including Karachi, in a fresh blow to households and businesses at the start of the new financial year.

results.title: Study shows widening gap between AI adoption and organizational accountability
results.description: Public concern over AI lacking human oversight surged 63% in 2025, a study finds. Companies deploy the technology faster than they can ensure public accountability.

results.title: Chandigarh Police bust Pakistan-linked narco-terror, fake currency network
results.description: Expanding its investigation into the daylight murder of a pharmacy cashier in Sector 11 last month, Chandigarh Police has dismantled a cross-border and inter-state network involved in the supply of illegal arms, methamphetamine and Fake Indian Currency Notes (FICN), arresting four more accused, including the alleged main conspirator lodged in Kapurthala Jail.
